_publications._publicationTitle: Long Noncoding RNA WT1-AS Inhibit Cell Malignancy via miR-494-3p in Glioma.

_contextSnippet: p-Akt levels reduced by WT1-AS were rescued by miR-494-3p
details: Successfully detected p-Akt protein levels by Western blot, showing reduced levels with WT1-AS overexpression that were rescued by miR-494-3p
